description_long: This bungalow features a modern design with a prominent gable roof and large skylights on both roof slopes. The exterior is clad in gray shingles and light-colored siding, with a cantilevered section on one side supported by wooden posts. The front facade includes a covered porch with a wide stairway leading up to the main entrance, and the porch is bordered by a railing. Large windows are arranged symmetrically on the front and rear, while the side elevations have a mix of grouped and single windows. The structure sits on a raised foundation, and the overall form is elongated with a strong horizontal emphasis. The roof includes two chimneys and a central glass atrium that brings natural light into the core of the building.
description: A modern bungalow with a gable roof, large skylights, a cantilevered side section, and a covered front porch with symmetrical window arrangements.
description_view_0: The main facade shows the covered porch, wide steps, and the cantilevered side section with supporting posts.
description_view_1: The gable end reveals the full width of the porch, the symmetrical window arrangement, and the central entrance.
description_view_2: The rear elevation highlights the glass atrium, skylights, and the cantilevered section extending from the side.
description_view_3: The opposite gable end displays a simpler facade with grouped windows and the raised foundation.
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical front-facing windows with grouped side and rear windows
